Porsche
Porsche Cayenne S
From $89,900
Powertrain
Engine2.9L V6 TT
Horsepower474 hp
Torque442 lb-ft
0-60 mph4.7s
Fuel economy21 MPG
DrivePTM AWD
Practicality
Seating5-seat
Rows2-row
Max cargo62.4 ft3
Tow capacity7,716 lbs
Ownership
SuspensionAir / PASM
PlatformJ1 (MLB Evo)
Warranty4yr / 50k
J.D. Power88/100
C&D ReviewRead ↗
Fastest 0-60 here. GTS adds PDCC + rear-steer at $132k. Turbo E-Hybrid reaches 729 hp. Highest J.D. Power score.
Best Value
The Volvo XC90 starts $23k below the Cayenne S and $37k below the BMW M60i with comparable 3-row seating, air suspension, and strong reliability. T8 PHEV adds 455 hp at $79k - still under the BMW.
Best Performance
The Porsche Cayenne S and BMW X7 M60i tie on 0-60 at 4.7s. The Porsche wins on driver feel - sharper steering, rear-axle optional, PASM standard. The BMW wins on interior volume and 3 rows.
Best Off-Road
The Lexus GX 550 Overtrail+ is the only body-on-frame vehicle here. Electronic rear locker, 33" all-terrain tires, Crawl Control, Multi-Terrain Select - off-road capability the other three cannot match.
Best Sport Daily
The Porsche Cayenne S earns the highest J.D. Power score (88/100) and the sharpest on-road dynamics. PASM adaptive suspension and Porsche Traction Management make it the most driver-focused choice.
